summary: Completed frontend testing of Ri'DN Partner Dashboard. All requested features are working correctly: light mode text visibility across all pages, notification bell icon visibility in both themes, Add User functionality, Slot Management page, and Support page with Lucide React icons.
critical_code_review_comments: All light mode text colors are properly implemented using Tailwind's dark: prefix pattern
NotificationsPanel.js correctly uses useTheme() context for theme-aware bell icon styling
Support.js uses Lucide React icons (Database, Sprout, BookOpen, Video, MessageCircle, Mail, Settings, CheckCircle) - no emojis
SlotManagement.js properly implements outlet selector, date navigation, and time slots grid
AddUserModal.js has proper form validation and error handling

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped as requested

seed_data_creation: Data was pre-seeded - 30 outlets, 120 bookings, 10 services, 3 users available
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Light mode text visibility verified on Dashboard, Bookings, Outlets, Services, Finance, Reports, Users, Support, and Slot Management pages. Notification bell icon changes color based on theme (white in dark mode, gray in light mode). Add User modal opens correctly with all form fields. Support page uses Lucide React icons instead of emojis.

light_mode_text_visibility.dashboard: PASS - Text visible with proper contrast
light_mode_text_visibility.bookings: PASS - Table headers and data readable
light_mode_text_visibility.outlets: PASS - Cards show proper text contrast
light_mode_text_visibility.services: PASS - Duration and price text visible
light_mode_text_visibility.slot_management: PASS - Time slots and stats visible

add_user_functionality.form_fields: PASS - Full Name, Email, Phone, Role, Password fields present

slot_management_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Bays, Today's Appointments, Completed, Pending
